name: Broiled Salmon Steak with French Dressing
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Melted butter or canola oil
recipeInstructions:
----------------------FRENCH DRESSING----------------------
1. White wine vinegar
2. Salt
3. Black pepper, freshly ground
4. 8 tbsp Olive and/or peanut oil
5. Brush the salmon with the French dressing; let stand for one hour.
6. Place into the broiler; brush with butter.
7. Broil for 12 to 15 minutes, cooking on both sides.
8. Transfer to a hot platter; season to taste with salt, pepper, lemon juice; sprinkle with chopped parsley.
9. Serve with Béarnaise sauce.
French Dressing: Mix vinegar with salt and pepper to taste. Add oil; beat with a fork until the mixture thickens. For a slightly thicker dressing, add an ice cube; stir for one to two minutes longer; remove the ice.
